name: Klingons
recipeInstructions:
1. MELT THE MARSHMALLOWS, PEANUT BUTTER AND BUTTER for 2 minutes on HIGH in the MICROWAVE.
2. ADD THE REST of the ingredients and MIX WELL.
3. DROP by TABLESPOON onto WAXED PAPER or SPREAD into a GREASED 9X13 INGREDIENT BOWL.
4. ALLOW to COOL completely.
5. CUT into SQUARES.
